que: What is the main goal of battery optimization in Android apps?
options: To maximize background work regardless of need
To perform useful work while minimizing unnecessary power usage

que: Which issue is a core Android vitals concern related to battery for apps?
Which of the following is a common battery drain source?
Why is WorkManager often preferred for background work?
options: It integrates with Android scheduling behavior and helps avoid custom inefficient loops

que: What should you do with wake locks?
options: Release them as soon as possible

que: How can Android system state affect background work?
options: It cannot affect it at all
The system can defer or limit work based on power state and app state

que: Which behavior is better for battery life?
options: Polling the server every few seconds

que: Why should developers monitor Android vitals?
options: To understand app quality issues including battery-related bad behaviors

que: What is a common mistake in battery optimization?
options: Scheduling too many frequent jobs or alarms

que: Which official docs best support this topic?
